retirementCandidates.name: api:debug:gate
retirementCandidates.reason: niche/manual runner; kanonik gate disinda tutulabilir

retirementCandidates.name: gmaps:enrich:dry
retirementCandidates.reason: niche/manual runner; kanonik gate disinda tutulabilir

scripts.name: ops:cwp:deploy:full
scripts.command: npm run build && node scripts/deploy-server-chunks.mjs && node scripts/deploy-client-chunks.mjs --restart && node scripts/cache-warm.mjs

scripts.name: ops:cwp:oneshot
scripts.command: npm run ops:cwp:preflight && npm run ops:cwp:safe-deploy && npm run ops:cwp:release-readiness

scripts.name: images:pipeline
scripts.command: npm run images:check-keys && npm run images:download && npm run images:map && npm run images:check-external && npm run images:validate && npm run images:quality && npm run images:moderate

scripts.name: images:pipeline:db
scripts.command: npm run images:pipeline && npm run images:sync-db && npm run images:moderation:sync-db

scripts.name: dev:isolated:ensure
scripts.command: npm run -s runtime:preflight:dev && node scripts/runtime/dev-daemon.mjs ensure

scripts.name: dev:isolated:restart
scripts.command: npm run -s runtime:preflight:dev && node scripts/runtime/dev-daemon.mjs restart

scripts.name: dev:isolated:start
scripts.command: npm run -s runtime:preflight:dev && node scripts/runtime/dev-daemon.mjs start

scripts.name: dev:isolated:stop:all
scripts.command: npm run -s dev:isolated:stop && npm run -s dev:isolated:check-no-orphan && npm run -s redis:isolated:stop

scripts.name: test
scripts.command: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e

scripts.name: test:e2e:batch:clean
scripts.command: node scripts/runtime/run-with-cleanup.mjs "npm run test:e2e:preflight && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --config=playwright.config.ts e2e/home.spec.ts e2e/analytics/realtime-feed.spec.ts e2e/analytics/realtime-metrics.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=2"

scripts.name: test:e2e:social:phase1
scripts.command: npm run test:e2e:preflight && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --config=playwright.config.ts e2e/social-phase1.spec.ts --project=chromium

scripts.name: blog:content:ops
scripts.command: npm run -s blog:keyword:research && npm run -s ollama:readiness && npm run -s blog:ollama:drafts && npm run -s blog:ollama:expand && npm run -s blog:rich-results:report && npm run -s pagespeed:api:research

scripts.name: release:candidate
scripts.command: npm run frontend:release:ready:gate && npm run gate:done && npm run release:readiness:report

scripts.name: lint:ci
scripts.command: astro check && npm run lint && npm run images:check-external && npm run images:validate

scripts.name: lint:phase:gate
scripts.command: npm run lint:phase:api && npm run lint:phase:lib && npm run lint:phase:components

scripts.name: audit:admin
scripts.command: npm run audit:admin:browser && npm run audit:admin:mobile && npm run audit:admin:a11y && npm run audit:admin:perf

scripts.name: workflow:standards:all
scripts.command: npm run workflow:standards:gate && npm run workflow:standards:report

scripts.name: workflow:standards:verify
scripts.command: npm run workflow:standards:autofix:check && npm run workflow:standards:gate && npm run workflow:standards:report

scripts.name: runtime:preflight:dev
scripts.command: npm run -s runtime:preflight:redis && npm run -s runtime:preflight:isolation

scripts.name: frontend:release:ready:gate
scripts.command: npm run frontend:quality:gate && npm run design:drift:gate && npm run public:design:contract:gate && npm run content:image:relevance:gate && npm run home:images:html:local && npm run responsive:readability:local && npm run home:section:contract:gate && npm run smoke:landing:theme-surface && npm run page:template:system:gate && npm run page:template:adoption:gate && npm run seo:helper:adoption:gate && npm run route:ownership:gate && npm run visual:regression:gate && npm run frontend:release:checklist:gate && npm run home:any:report && npm run home:any:ratchet:gate && npm run release:readiness:dashboard && npm run release:readiness:admin:gate && npm run smoke:admin:surface

scripts.name: quality:metrics:ci
scripts.command: node scripts/ci/collect-quality-metrics.mjs --lint lint.log --type type-check.log --api api-release-gate.log --openapi docs/openapi-route-gap-baseline.json

scripts.name: security:check
scripts.command: npm run security:scan-secrets && npm run security:defaults:gate

scripts.name: api:release:gate
scripts.command: npm run test:api-contract:coverage && npm run test:api-contract:groups && npm run openapi:sync:routes:gate && npm run openapi:city-services:gate && npm run sdk:generate:check && npm run smoke:api:critical && npm run smoke:site-settings:schema && npm run openapi:p0:report && npm run openapi:p0:regression-gate && npm run problemjson:strict

scripts.name: gate:done
scripts.command: npm run env:gate && npm run runtime:single-process:gate && npm run workflow:standards:verify && npm run ops:contracts:gate && npm run canonical:domain:gate && npm run phase1:free:gate && npm run admin:db:first:gate && npm run social:safety:gate && npm run social:db:first:gate && npm run db:refs:gate && npm run lifecycle:standard:gate && npm run landing:agency:gate && npm run recommendations:master:gate && npm run hosting:panel:gate && npm run frontend:release:ready:gate && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run db:migrate:check-duplicates && npm run api:release:gate && npm run smoke:pages:critical && npm run smoke:images:critical && npm run smoke:db:backup-restore && npm run images:check-external && npm run images:validate && npm run images:quality && npm run images:moderate && npm run images:slug:gate && npm run images:integrity:gate && npm run categories:coverage:gate && npm run public:city:gate && npm run seo:geo:gate && npm run content:cluster:quality && npm run content:programmatic:quality && npm run social:core:gate:strict && npm run problemjson:strict && npm run security:scan-secrets && npm run security:defaults:gate && npm run storage:local:gate && npm run pagespeed:api-less && npm run release:readiness:report

scripts.name: sdk:generate:check
scripts.command: npm run sdk:generate && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('sdk/generated/client.ts')) process.exit(1)"
